# Group

Groups buttons or elements together with shared borders and consistent spacing.

## Import

```jsx
import { Group } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| attached | `boolean` | `false` | Whether items share borders (no gap) |
| grow | `boolean` | `false` | Whether items should grow equally |
| children | `ReactNode` | - | Group items |

## Usage

```jsx
<Group attached>
  <Button variant="outline">Left</Button>
  <Button variant="outline">Center</Button>
  <Button variant="outline">Right</Button>
</Group>

<Group grow>
  <Button>Option A</Button>
  <Button>Option B</Button>
</Group>
```

## Features

- Attach items to share borders
- Grow items to fill available space
- Works great for button groups and toolbars
